$comment: Module registry for the central docs hub aggregation (AAASM-3659). Each entry is a module whose docs are built from its default channel (master/main HEAD) and mounted under /<subpath>/ in the aggregated site. 'ref' pins the checkout; use a tag/SHA to pin a release line. The hub mdBook itself is built from THIS repo at root and is not listed here.

modules.name: core
modules.channel: FULL version set: master HEAD under /core/latest/ PLUS every release git tag rebuilt into /core/<tag>/, with the channels+archived manifest at /core/versions.json (AAASM-3753)
modules.base_url_strategy: mdBook emits root-relative asset paths, so it is subpath-safe with no flag. The in-theme #aaasm-version-selector derives the site root from path_to_root at runtime and fetches /core/versions.json, so each book lives under /core/latest/ and /core/<tag>/ with the manifest + a site-root redirect at /core/.
modules.build: cd docs && mdbook build -d <out>/latest; then for each 'v*.*.*' git tag: git worktree add + mdbook build -d <out>/<tag> (logging extra-archived.txt); then python3 docs/ci/build_versions.py latest latest <out>/versions.json (archived[] seeded from the rebuilt tags = git source of truth; moving pre-release/stable channels seeded from the live deployed manifest); cp docs/site-root-index.html <out>/index.html

modules.name: python-sdk
modules.channel: FULL mike version tree reused from the python-sdk gh-pages branch — versions.json + every per-version dir + channel aliases latest/stable/pre-release (AAASM-3752)
modules.base_url_strategy: Reuse the already-published gh-pages branch verbatim: its layout (gh-pages root == /python-sdk/) is identical to the standalone site, so the mike/material version dropdown works unchanged. Alias symlinks are dereferenced (cp -RL) because GitHub Pages does not follow symlinks. No mkdocs build is run here.
modules.build: git clone --depth 1 -b gh-pages <repo> tmp; cp -RL tmp/. <out>/

modules.name: node-sdk
modules.channel: default (lastVersion served at root; baseUrl already /node-sdk/)
modules.base_url_strategy: docusaurus.config.ts already sets baseUrl=/node-sdk/, so absolute asset paths are emitted under /node-sdk/. pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm build.
modules.build: cd website && pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm build

modules.name: go-sdk
modules.channel: FULL version set: every git tag recomputed into website/data/versions.toml (replicating docs-site.yml) then built via the repo's own build_all_versions.sh — /go-sdk/latest/ + moving channels + /go-sdk/<tag>/ for every archived tag, plus a site-root redirect (AAASM-3753)
modules.base_url_strategy: First recompute website/data/versions.toml from git tags using the repo's website/scripts/versions_channels.py (the version dropdown is baked into each page at Hugo build time, so the full set must be in versions.toml BEFORE building). Then run website/scripts/build_all_versions.sh with PAGES_BASE=/go-sdk so each entry is emitted under /go-sdk/<channel-or-tag>/ with absolute assets — matching params.versionsBasePath=/go-sdk, so the selector links resolve in the hub exactly as on the standalone site. A site-root redirect (website/redirect/index.html) lands /go-sdk/ on the best channel.
modules.build: cd <src> && python3 (recompute website/data/versions.toml from `git tag -l 'v*'` via versions_channels.py) && PAGES_BASE=/go-sdk PUBLIC_DIR=<out> REPO_ROOT=<src> MASTER_REF=HEAD bash website/scripts/build_all_versions.sh; render website/redirect/index.html -> <out>/index.html

modules.name: arena
modules.channel: FULL mike version tree reused from the arena gh-pages branch — versions.json + every per-version dir + channel aliases latest/stable/pre-release (AAASM-4414)
modules.base_url_strategy: Reuse the already-published gh-pages branch verbatim: its layout (gh-pages root == /arena/) is identical to the standalone site, so the mike/material version dropdown works unchanged. Alias symlinks are dereferenced (cp -RL) because GitHub Pages does not follow symlinks. No mkdocs build is run here.
modules.build: git clone --depth 1 -b gh-pages <repo> tmp; cp -RL tmp/. <out>/
